query: Install Vibooks on this Mac, connect to the local book safely, and tell me how to verify the API is ready before posting anything.

Convert this CSV to JSON and add a derived column.
I need advice on whether to form an LLC or a corporation.
Open QuickBooks and explain their pricing tiers.
